summary: Tested AI 'Draft my plan' feature end-to-end (backend + frontend). 15/15 backend pytest cases passed against POST /api/admin/leads/{id}/deliverable/draft using Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM. Frontend Playwright validated the violet 'Draft with AI' button with Sparkles icon, the fill-empty-only merge behavior (pre-filled intro 'KEEP ME' and zone 'KEEP ZONE' both preserved), AI population of intro/needs/zones/shopping_list/strategy/action_plan/benefits/summary/wall_color, success toast, save persistence after reload, and PDF generation returning application/pdf (~11KB, >2KB threshold).
critical_code_review_comments: ai_drafter.py + AdminDeliverable.jsx are clean and well-structured (under 700 lines, async LLM call, proper hex validation fallback, MongoDB _id excluded via projection).

applyDraft() correctly implements fill-empty-only semantics: text fields filled only if isEmptyText, lists filled only if isEmptyList/isEmptyObjList, hex replaced only if empty or default #cfd7d3 — verified working in live test.
Minor: shopping_list price=0 is technically allowed by the schema but the LLM consistently returns >0 prices (test asserts this). No fix needed unless price=0 is desired for free items.
test_credentials: Admin password: garage2025 (X-Admin-Token header). EMERGENT_LLM_KEY present in /app/backend/.env.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded lead 38f41e32-005d-4900-b3d4-5310f1d887ed (Test User, sage + warm_neutrals colors, calm + minimal feeling). For schema test, fixture auto-picks any lead with desired_feeling+color_prefs+bothers_about.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend draft endpoint takes ~15-30s (Claude Sonnet 4.5). Use timeout >=60s. The applyDraft merge logic in AdminDeliverable.jsx preserves admin-entered fields — when retesting, pre-fill at least one text field and verify it remains. PDF endpoint requires deliverable to be saved first (the frontend Save+PDF flow does this automatically).
verified_behaviors: Auth: 401 without/wrong X-Admin-Token; 404 for unknown lead
Draft schema: intro/needs/zones(title+desc)/wall_color_*/shopping_list(name+qty+price>0)/budget_note/strategy/action_plan/benefits/notes/summary/attachment_note all present and well-typed
shopping_list has 4+ items, all names non-empty, all prices > 0
Semantic relevance: output references the lead's desired_feeling (calm/minimal) and color_prefs (sage → 'Softened Sage' wall name)
Frontend: violet button labeled 'Draft with AI' with Sparkles icon, data-testid=deliverable-ai-draft
Frontend: fill-empty-only — intro 'KEEP ME' and zone-title-0 'KEEP ZONE' preserved; other empty fields populated by AI
Frontend: success toast 'AI draft applied to empty fields' appears
Frontend: Save + reload persists AI-drafted content (verified intro still 'KEEP ME' and wall_color_name 'Softened Sage')
Frontend: PDF download returns application/pdf, ~11KB (>2KB threshold), status 200
